original_statement: which super series offered the most prize money?
mutated_statement: which something did something the most something?
mutation_analysis: [Entity/generalization] + [Verb replacement] + [Object/generalization]: "super series" → "something" (specific event series replaced by a placeholder) | "offered" → "did something" (content verb replaced by generic "do" + placeholder, altering voice/structure) | "prize money" → "something" (specific quantified noun replaced by a placeholder)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可识别关键信息：“Although the question text is vague”及随后说明最高奖金为500,000并指向“super series finals”。agent在日志中也在thought里说明“唯一的定量‘most’是prize money”。由此可见，agent明确察觉问题表述模糊，但没有向用户求证或请求澄清，而是基于现有表格数据作出合理假设并直接给出具体答案（super series finals）。因此符合“意识到模糊但仍猜测并回答”的分类。
